matchingDescription: UK flat-fee investment platform, stocks and shares ISA, SIPP pension, dividend investing

variants.text: Open an award-winning Stocks and Shares ISA with interactive investor — start investing tax-efficiently. Capital at risk.
Consolidate old pensions into a SIPP with interactive investor and manage your retirement investments alongside your ISA in one place. Capital at risk.
For investors building a long-term portfolio, interactive investor's award-winning ISA gives access to thousands of UK and international investments. Capital at risk.

A £100,000 ISA on a 0.25% annual fee platform costs £250 per year; the same portfolio on Interactive Investor's flat £9.99 monthly plan costs £120 — a difference that compounds over a 20-year investment horizon.

Over 20 years, the difference between a 0.45% platform fee and a flat monthly fee can exceed £15,000 on a £100,000 portfolio (assuming 7% annual growth). The break-even point for a flat fee is typically around £50,000 invested.

FTSE 100 companies paid out £78.8bn in dividends in 2023 according to AJ Bell's Dividend Dashboard. Investors who reinvested dividends in UK equities over the past 20 years saw returns roughly double those who did not.

The Pensions Policy Institute estimates 2.8 million pension pots in the UK are currently 'lost' — deferred workplace pensions whose holders have lost track of them, totalling an estimated £26.6bn in unclaimed retirement savings.
